channel.title: Morning Whisper Radio
channel.description: Meditative morning news broadcasts with audio and show notes.

item.title: Global volatility, AI infrastructure, and energy security shape the morning briefing
item.description: Selected sources: NVIDIA Blog: NVIDIA Enables the Next Era Of Physical AI Research With Agent Skills For Autonomous Vehicles, Robotics And Vision AI; Handelsblatt: +++ Ukraine-Krieg +++: Ukraine – EU-Staaten geben grünes Licht für erste Phase der Beitrittsgespräche; France24 En: Models suggest amplitude of El Niño in 2026 'as high or higher than any event in last century'; Google Research Blog: The next chapter in flood resilience: Open sourcing Google’s hydrology framework; Business: American capitalism has taken an apocalyptic turn; OpenAI News: Introducing new capabilities to GPT-Rosalind; FAZ Wirtschaft: Handelspolitik: Trump plant neue Zölle – wegen Zwangsarbeit; NVIDIA Technical Blog: Build Personal AI Agents on Windows PCs with New Tools from Microsoft and NVIDIA

item.title: NVIDIA unveils new general-purpose AI capabilities for robotics, while global reports cover ongoing Middle East tensions, the cautious
item.description: Selected sources: NVIDIA Blog: NVIDIA Enables the Next Era Of Physical AI Research With Agent Skills For Autonomous Vehicles, Robotics And Vision AI; Handelsblatt: Übernahmekampf: Woher stammen die Commerzbank-Aktien für Unicredit?; France24 Fr: Opération "ville morte" à Kinshasa, initiée par la coalition d'opposition C64; NVIDIA Technical Blog: Deploy Self-Evolving Agents for Faster, More Secure Research with a Hermes Agent and NVIDIA NemoClaw; Business: American capitalism has taken an apocalyptic turn; Google Research Blog: The next chapter in flood resilience: Open sourcing Google’s hydrology framework; FAZ Wirtschaft: Handelspolitik: Trump plant neue Zölle – wegen Zwangsarbeit; OpenAI News: Introducing new capabilities to GPT-Rosalind

item.title: NVIDIA Enables the Next Era Of Physical AI Research With Agent Skills For Autonomous Vehicles, Robotics, Vision AI; Wall Street: US-Börsen
item.description: Selected sources: NVIDIA Blog: NVIDIA Enables the Next Era Of Physical AI Research With Agent Skills For Autonomous Vehicles, Robotics And Vision AI; Handelsblatt: Wall Street: US-Börsen geben nach – KI-Titel legen weiter zu; France24 En: 'Both sides are committed' to US-EU trade deal, US Trade Representative Jamieson Greer says; Hugging Face Blog: Direct Preference Optimization Beyond Chatbots; Business: BYD is losing its spark; NVIDIA Technical Blog: Deploy Self-Evolving Agents for Faster, More Secure Research with a Hermes Agent and NVIDIA NemoClaw; FAZ Wirtschaft: Umstrittener Steuervorteil: Union erteilt Reform des Ehegattensplittings Absage; Deutsche Welle English: UK Royal Navy helicopter crash leaves 3 dead

item.title: Financial intelligence models, AI-driven cyber threat mapping, escalating tensions in Eastern Europe, the Middle East, alongside volatility
item.description: Selected sources: NVIDIA Blog: Why Financial Institutions Are Converging on Transaction Foundation Models to Build Their Own Intelligence; FAZ Wirtschaft: Gesetz für digitale Märkte: Meta muss sich mit Messenger an schärfere Wettbewerbsregeln halten; France24 Fr: Une vidéo montre l'animateur Martinez Zogo torturé au procès de l'assassinat; NVIDIA Technical Blog: Deploy Self-Evolving Agents for Faster, More Secure Research with a Hermes Agent and NVIDIA NemoClaw; Hugging Face Blog: Holo3.1: Fast & Local Computer Use Agents; Finance: Want to know the future? Don’t trust the stockmarket; Handelsblatt: Dax aktuell: Dax notiert im Minus – und fällt unter 25.000-Punkte-Marke; Unitree News: - Unitree Robotics

item.title: Morning Whisper Radio: Today's briefing leads with NVIDIA's push into autonomous industrial AI, Anthropic's latest agent capabilities
item.description: Selected sources: NVIDIA Blog: Industrial Software Leaders Build Secure, Autonomous AI Engineers With NVIDIA NemoClaw; Handelsblatt: USA: Sohn kauft Aktien, Vater treibt die Kurse an: Diese Beispiele zeigen, wie Familie Trump Kasse macht; Deutsche Welle English: World Cup: David Beckham to get Hollywood Walk of Fame star; NVIDIA Technical Blog: Deploy Self-Evolving Agents for Faster, More Secure Research with a Hermes Agent and NVIDIA NemoClaw; Finance: Want to know the future? Don’t trust the stockmarket; Hugging Face Blog: Holo3.1: Fast & Local Computer Use Agents; FAZ Wirtschaft: Rüstung: Indien verkauft seine Superrakete an Südostasien – zur Freude Russlands; Helsing News: Finance Project Manager - Helsing
